'''âdh-ch-p''' ('''kadhachap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chastise|chastise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ch-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chastise|chastise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-ch-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadhachap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhachap|thidhachap]] || [[word:jidhachap|jidhachap]] || [[word:shidhachap|shidhachap]] || [[word:kidhachap|kidhachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhachap|thuthudhachap]] || [[word:jujudhachap|jujudhachap]] || [[word:shushudhachap|shushudhachap]] || [[word:kukudhachap|kukudhachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhachap|thudhachap]] || [[word:judhachap|judhachap]] || [[word:shudhachap|shudhachap]] || [[word:kudhachap|kudhachap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhachap|thudhachap]] || [[word:judhachap|judhachap]] || [[word:shudhachap|shudhachap]] || [[word:kudhachap|kudhachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhachap|thedhachap]] || [[word:jedhachap|jedhachap]] || [[word:shedhachap|shedhachap]] || [[word:kedhachap|kedhachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhachap|thothodhachap]] || [[word:jojodhachap|jojodhachap]] || [[word:shoshodhachap|shoshodhachap]] || [[word:kokodhachap|kokodhachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhachap|thodhachap]] || [[word:jodhachap|jodhachap]] || [[word:shodhachap|shodhachap]] || [[word:kodhachap|kodhachap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhachap|thodhachap]] || [[word:jodhachap|jodhachap]] || [[word:shodhachap|shodhachap]] || [[word:kodhachap|kodhachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhachap|thĂŠdhachap]] || [[word:jĂŠdhachap|jĂŠdhachap]] || [[word:shĂŠdhachap|shĂŠdhachap]] || [[word:kĂŠdhachap|kĂŠdhachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhachap|thathadhachap]] || [[word:jajadhachap|jajadhachap]] || [[word:shashadhachap|shashadhachap]] || [[word:kakadhachap|kakadhachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhachap|thadhachap]] || [[word:jadhachap|jadhachap]] || [[word:shadhachap|shadhachap]] || [[word:kadhachap|kadhachap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhachap|thadhachap]] || [[word:jadhachap|jadhachap]] || [[word:shadhachap|shadhachap]] || [[word:kadhachap|kadhachap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhachap|shadhachap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhachap|goshadhachap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhachap|gokishadhachap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhachapnĂŒ|shadhachapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhachapnknĂŒ|goshadhachapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhachapnĂŒ|gokishadhachapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhachapshĂ«|shadhachapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkshĂ«|goshadhachapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhachapshĂ«|gokishadhachapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhachapro|shadhachapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkro|goshadhachapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhachapro|gokishadhachapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhachapmu|shadhachapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkmu|goshadhachapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhachapmu|gokishadhachapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhachapsher|shadhachapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhachapnksher|goshadhachapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhachapsher|gokishadhachapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhachapng|shadhachapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkng|goshadhachapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhachapng|gokishadhachapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhachapya|shadhachapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkya|goshadhachapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhachapya|gokishadhachapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhachapyam|shadhachapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkyam|goshadhachapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhachapyam|gokishadhachapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhachapnĂŒshĂ«|shadhachapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhachapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhachapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhachapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhachapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhachapnĂŒro|shadhachapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhachapnknĂŒro|goshadhachapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhachapnĂŒro|gokishadhachapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhachapnĂŒmu|shadhachapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhachapnknĂŒmu|goshadhachapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhachapnĂŒmu|gokishadhachapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhachapshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhachapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhachapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhachapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhachapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhachapshĂ«ro|shadhachapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkshĂ«ro|goshadhachapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhachapshĂ«ro|gokishadhachapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhachapshĂ«mu|shadhachapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkshĂ«mu|goshadhachapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhachapshĂ«mu|gokishadhachapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhachapronĂŒ|shadhachapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkronĂŒ|goshadhachapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhachapronĂŒ|gokishadhachapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhachaproshĂ«|shadhachaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkroshĂ«|goshadhachapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhachaproshĂ«|gokishadhachaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhachapromu|shadhachapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkromu|goshadhachapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhachapromu|gokishadhachapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhachapmunĂŒ|shadhachapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkmunĂŒ|goshadhachapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhachapmunĂŒ|gokishadhachapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhachapmushĂ«|shadhachapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkmushĂ«|goshadhachapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhachapmushĂ«|gokishadhachapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhachapmuro|shadhachapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhachapnkmuro|goshadhachapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhachapmuro|gokishadhachapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
